---
title: ""
format: revealjs
execute: 
  echo: false
---

<!-- Custom Title Slide -->

<section class="title-slide">

<img src="images/finance_logo.png" width="120">

# National Budget Presentation  
## Fiscal Year 2025–26

### Finance Division

</section>

---

## Presentation Overview

- Macroeconomic Outlook
- Revenue Performance
- Expenditure Structure
- Sector Allocation
- Five-Year Trend
- Policy Priorities

---

## Macroeconomic Snapshot

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

df <- tibble(
year=c(2021,2022,2023,2024,2025),
gdp=c(6.2,7.1,6.8,7.3,7.5)
)

ggplot(df,aes(year,gdp))+
geom_line(linewidth=2,color="#1565C0")+
geom_point(size=4)+
theme_minimal(base_size=18)+
labs(
title="GDP Growth Trend",
y="Growth (%)",
x=""
)
```

---

## Budget Composition

::: columns

::: column

### Budget Size

- Total Budget: **7.5 Trillion**
- Revenue: **5.0 Trillion**
- Deficit: **2.5 Trillion**

:::

::: column

```{r}
pie <- data.frame(
sector=c("Revenue","Deficit"),
value=c(500,250)
)

ggplot(pie,aes(x="",y=value,fill=sector))+
geom_bar(stat="identity",width=1)+
coord_polar("y")+
theme_void()+
theme(text=element_text(size=18))
```

:::

:::

---

## Interactive Budget Dashboard

```{r}
library(plotly)

fig <- plot_ly(
x=c("Education","Health","Infrastructure","Agriculture"),
y=c(95,42,120,35),
type="bar"
)

fig
```

---

## Five Year Trend

```{r}
df <- data.frame(
year=2021:2025,
expense=c(520,560,610,680,750)
)

ggplot(df,aes(year,expense))+
geom_col(fill="#2E7D32")+
theme_minimal(base_size=18)+
labs(
title="Government Expenditure Trend",
y="Billion"
)
```

---

## Policy Priorities {.center}

::: {.fragment}
Infrastructure investment expansion
:::

::: {.fragment}
Digital governance
:::

::: {.fragment}
Climate resilient economy
:::

::: {.fragment}
Human capital development
:::

---

## Budget Allocation Map {background-image="images/bg_data.jpg"}

### Key Investment Areas

- Transportation
- Energy
- Education
- Health

---

## Key Takeaways

✔ Sustainable fiscal strategy  
✔ Strategic infrastructure spending  
✔ Strong revenue mobilization  

---

# Thank You

### Questions?
